positive: Stylized deep space nebula forming a mystical, geometric pattern, rendered in vibrant ultramarine blue, sapphire, and neon violet hues. The main subject is a floating crystalline cosmic entity structure, featuring sharp, elegant lines and soft, glowing internal veins. The composition is perfectly centered, utilizing negative space for high contrast, mimicking a breathable, tattoo-like silhouette suitable for apparel. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, soft glow emanating only from the nebula core. Minimalist, ethereal, vector-art style, high saturation, ultra-detailed print quality, concept art, symmetry.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, low quality, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, distorted, jpeg artifacts, messy, photorealistic
